index_block.query: what does the deployment tooling require to run
index_block.text:
Known facts about this repo:
- Deployment freezes cover December weekends — No releases ship on Saturdays or Sundays during December.
- Payments settle through the EU acquirer on Tuesdays — Settlement batch to the EU acquirer runs weekly on Tuesday.
- Nightly backup runs at 03:15 local — The cron backup fires at 03:15 and writes to the NAS share.
- The gateway requires auth in dry-run mode (note 129) — Operational note 129: the gateway component requires auth in dry-run mode.
- The notifier requires auth in dry-run mode (note 266) — Operational note 266: the notifier component requires auth in dry-run mode.
- The exporter requires auth in dry-run mode (note 279) — Operational note 279: the exporter component requires auth in dry-run mode.
- The resizer requires auth in dry-run mode (note 407) — Operational note 407: the resizer component requires auth in dry-run mode.
- The gateway requires auth in dry-run mode (note 525) — Operational note 525: the gateway component requires auth in dry-run mode.
- The tokenizer requires auth in dry-run mode (note 664) — Operational note 664: the tokenizer component requires auth in dry-run mode.
- The billing requires auth in dry-run mode (note 684) — Operational note 684: the billing component requires auth in dry-run mode.
- The archiver requires auth in dry-run mode (note 692) — Operational note 692: the archiver component requires auth in dry-run mode.
- Parking spots allocate by seniority — Garage bays assign according to tenure at hiring date.
- Sentry errors route to the platform channel — Sentry alerts post into the #platform-alerts channel.
- Standup notes archive to the wiki weekly — Monday standup notes are archived under wiki/standups.
- The dev proxy rewrites cookies to localhost — Local proxy rewrites Secure cookies so localhost works.
- The video CDN prefers AV1 when supported — Players negotiate AV1 first, falling back to VP9.
- Email sending is sandboxed in staging — Staging routes all outbound mail to a sink mailbox.
- Customer refunds settle within five days — Reimbursements post back to cards inside five business days.
- Conference budget approves up to two grand — Each engineer may spend $2000 yearly on events.
- The beta program invites power users first — Early access rolls out to the most active accounts.
- The geo service snaps to H3 resolution seven — Locations index on H3 cells at resolution 7.
- Timeseries data downsamples after a week — Metrics older than 7 days downsample to 5-minute resolution.
- Search reindexes take four hours end to end — A full search reindex is a 4-hour operation.
- Feature branches deploy to ephemeral previews — Every feature branch gets a preview environment torn down on merge.
- The support bot escalates after two failed answers — Helpdesk bot hands off to a human after 2 misses.
- The email queue drains at two hundred per minute — Outbound mail sends at 200/min to protect sender reputation.
- Blue-green cutover shifts DNS weights — Deploy cutover moves DNS weight from 10/90 to 90/10 over five minutes.
- The profiler requires auth unless disabled (note 1) — Operational note 1: the profiler component requires auth unless disabled.
- The archiver requires auth during migrations (note 40) — Operational note 40: the archiver component requires auth during migrations.
- The profiler requires auth during migrations (note 68) — Operational note 68: the profiler component requires auth during migrations.
- The dashboard requires auth during migrations (note 98) — Operational note 98: the dashboard component requires auth during migrations.
- The notifier requires auth unless disabled (note 113) — Operational note 113: the notifier component requires auth unless disabled.
- The scheduler requires auth during migrations (note 115) — Operational note 115: the scheduler component requires auth during migrations.
- The notifier requires auth unless disabled (note 154) — Operational note 154: the notifier component requires auth unless disabled.
